    Class
    Description
    AlienCounter
    AlienCounter keeps track of alien crew presence on the ship.
    CondensedShip
     
    Coordinates
    Coordinates represents a point in a 2D grid with integer coordinates.
    DoubleCannonsCounter
    DoubleCannonsCounter keeps track of the number of front and other cannons on a ship.
    EnginesCounter
    EnginesCounter keeps track of the number of single and double engines on a ship.
    GoodCounter
    GoodCounter keeps track of the number of goods of different types on a ship.
    ShieldCounter
    ShieldCounter keeps track of the number of shields on each side of a ship.

    Full-featured ShipBoard for Galaxy Trucker.
